steps.title: Contrast few with too many
steps.content: The sentence contrasts the time when few minor planets had been discovered with the present, when so many are known that unique naming has become nearly impossible. The blank needs the opposite of nearly impossible.

steps.title: Reject wrong difficulty words
steps.content: Choice A means large or important, not doable. Choice B means impossible, which contradicts the contrast with the later situation. Choice D concerns unclear meaning, not whether the task can be done. The word meaning achievable fits the earlier period. The answer is C.
